client/package.json.general_idea: Add STOMP over WebSocket client library to support SockJS messaging protocol.
Add TypeScript definitions for SockJS client to ensure type safety.
Remove Socket.IO server library as it is not used in the client-side build.
Replace Socket.IO client with SockJS client to align with backend SockJS implementation.
Add UUID generation library for creating unique client identifiers.

client/src/app/layout.tsx.general_idea: Update the application metadata title to reflect the project name.
Update the application metadata description to reflect the project purpose.

client/src/app/page.tsx.general_idea: Remove unused MapService component and its import from the home page.
Add uuidv4 dependency to generate unique client identifiers.
Generate a unique client ID using uuidv4 and pass it to the SocketComponent.

client/src/components/MapService.tsx.general_idea: Added useEffect import to support new synchronization and marker update logic.
client/src/components/MapService.tsx.after: import { useState, useEffect, useRef, MutableRefObject } from "react";

client/src/components/MapService.tsx.general_idea: Added Libraries type import from react-google-maps/api for type safety.
client/src/components/MapService.tsx.before: import { GoogleMap, useLoadScript, Marker, Autocomplete } from "@react-google-maps/api";
client/src/components/MapService.tsx.after: import { GoogleMap, useLoadScript, Marker, Autocomplete, Libraries } from "@react-google-maps/api";

client/src/components/MapService.tsx.general_idea: Added WebSocketComponent import to enable real-time communication.
Defined LocationPayload interface to type the location data structure.
client/src/components/MapService.tsx.after: interface LocationPayload { clientId: string; latitude: number; longitude: number; }

client/src/components/MapService.tsx.general_idea: Refactored MapService to accept props for locations, messaging, and client ID instead of managing state internally.
client/src/components/MapService.tsx.after: const MapService = ({ locations, sendMessage, setCurrentLocation, id, locationMap }: { ... }) => {

client/src/components/MapService.tsx.general_idea: Added state and refs for markers, libraries, map instance, and synchronization control.
client/src/components/MapService.tsx.after: const [markers, setMarkers] = useState<Array<google.maps.Marker>>([]); ... const [isSyncing, setIsSyncing] = useState(true);

client/src/components/MapService.tsx.general_idea: Implemented useEffect to synchronize location fetching on a 10-second interval.
Implemented useEffect to update map markers based on the locationMap prop.
Added helper function to set map reference on all markers.
Refactored Google Maps API key assignment to use a variable and typed libraries ref.
Updated default map center coordinates to specific values.
Refactored handlePlaceChanged to stop synchronization instead of clearing location state.
Refactored handleGetLocationClick to send location via WebSocket and resume synchronization.
client/src/components/MapService.tsx.after: sendMessage({ clientId: id, latitude: latitude, longitude: longitude }); setIsSyncing(true)

client/src/components/MapService.tsx.general_idea: Refactored onMapLoad to store map ref, set initial center/zoom, and add control with guard.
Stylized the search input with Tailwind CSS classes.
Updated GoogleMap component props to use static ID and styling, removing dynamic center/zoom.
Removed individual Marker components from JSX as markers are now managed via state/refs.

client/src/components/SocketComponent.ts.general_idea: Replace Socket.IO client with SockJS and STOMP to align with the server-side protocol change.
client/src/components/SocketComponent.ts.why_exists: The server was migrated from Socket.IO to SockJS/STOMP (as indicated by git log 'change to sockjs' and 'Working connection between Spring server and SockJS'). The old Socket.IO client cannot communicate with the new server protocol, resulting in connection failures.

client/src/components/SocketComponent.ts.general_idea: Refactor component to manage STOMP client lifecycle and state explicitly.
Implement STOMP subscription logic to handle incoming location updates.
Implement STOMP publishing logic to send messages to the server.
Update UI to render MapService with new location data instead of status text.

server/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Replace the Google Cloud starter dependency with a Spring Boot Redis starter.
Remove the spring-cloud-dependencies BOM from dependency management.
Remove the spring-cloud-gcp-dependencies BOM from dependency management.

server/src/main/java/com/devicedetective.general_idea: Add MongoDB @Id annotation and field to support document identification.
Add clientId field to track client sessions.
Rename latitude field from double to String and fix typo.
Change longitude field type from double to String.
Update getter/setter for latitude to match new String type and name.
server/src/main/java/com/devicedetective.before: public double getLatitiude() ... public void setLatitiude(double latitiude)
server/src/main/java/com/devicedetective.after: public String getLatitude() ... public void setLatitude(String latitude)

server/src/main/java/com/devicedetective.general_idea: Update getter/setter for longitude to match new String type.
server/src/main/java/com/devicedetective.before: public double getLongitude() ... public void setLongitude(double longitude)
server/src/main/java/com/devicedetective.after: public String getLongitude() ... public void setLongitude(String longitude)

server/src/main/java/com/devicedetective.general_idea: Add Javadoc comments to class and fields.
Add SLF4J logger import to enable logging functionality in the main application class.
Add Javadoc documentation to the ServerApplication class explaining its purpose and annotations.

server/src/main/java/com/devicedetective.general_idea: Instantiate a static Logger field for the class to facilitate logging.
Refactor main method to include logging of server startup status.

server/src/main/java/com/devicedetective.general_idea: Enable SockJS fallback for WebSocket connections to support browsers that do not support native WebSockets.
Add Javadoc comments to the configuration class and its methods to improve code documentation.
Add inline comments explaining the purpose of message broker configuration steps.
